title: John Postlethwaite
compiled_truth: John Postlethwaite is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-17 to 2002-03-08), John Postlethwaite sent 109 and received 636 emails, totalling 745 interactions. Top correspondents: [W  White](people/w-white) (98), [Fran Chang](people/fran-chang) (18), [Heather Dunton](people/heather-dunton) (18), [Samantha Law](people/samantha-law) (18), [Nicholas Warner](people/nicholas-warner) (16).
